step_rationale: Alpha-1,4-N-acetylgalactosaminyltransferase; glycosylation enzyme affecting lipoprotein structure and immune recognition.
mechanism: A4GNT modulates glycosylation of lipoproteins and immune receptors, influencing oxidative modification and inflammatory responses in atherogenesis.

references.title: Exploring Potential Drug Targets in Multiple Cardiovascular Diseases: A Study Based on Proteome-Wide Mendelian Randomization and Colocalization Analysis.
